automatic_pass.label: Category you've exited or written off entirely
automatic_pass.reason: No more exposure desired; no new checks

automatic_pass.label: Applications without proprietary data or model differentiation
automatic_pass.reason: No structural moat — feature leads erode quickly

structural_flags.label: Valuation above $200M at pre-seed or seed
structural_flags.reason: Capital efficiency math becomes challenging at high entry prices

structural_flags.label: Founders without domain experience in the problem they're solving
Business models that require a policy change to work (vs. benefit from a tailwind)

notes: Automatic passes are non-negotiable regardless of score. Structural flags reduce scores within the rubric but don't force a pass on their own.
